column1: Ildemaro Vargas stands out as the top pick, riding a strong track record of consistency with hits in over 90% of his games and a favorable platoon edge against Nathan Eovaldi. Cody Bellinger offers a reliable alternative, benefiting from a solid recent stretch and a park boost in Baltimore. Luis Arraez also brings steady contact skills with a lefty advantage, but faces a tougher pitching matchup. All three provide dependable options for Beat The Streak selections today.
